title: Enrich canonical realtime position path with auth-free game-state push
objective: Add auth-free game-state context from the existing /api/games source into the canonical realtime position/SSE path without changing strategy or execution behavior.
acceptance_criteria: SSE can emit game-state updates for tracked positions
dashboard can show fresher live game context
rollback: Revert the narrow game-state enrichment changes in core/state_hub.py and dashboard_server.py.
